instruction: 帮我把销售数据汇总一下

command: DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.screensaver idle-activation-enabled false 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.session idle-delay 0 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset s off 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset -dpms 2>/dev/null; true

python3 -c "
import openpyxl
wb = openpyxl.Workbook()
ws = wb.active
ws['A1'] = '姓名'
ws['B1'] = '一月'
ws['C1'] = '二月'
ws['D1'] = '三月'
ws['A2'] = '张伟'
ws['B2'] = 8500
ws['C2'] = 7200
ws['D2'] = 9100
ws['A3'] = '李娜'
ws['B3'] = 6800
ws['C3'] = 7500
ws['D3'] = 8300
ws['A4'] = '王强'
ws['B4'] = 9200
ws['C4'] = 8100
ws['D4'] = 7600
ws['A5'] = '赵敏'
ws['B5'] = 7400
ws['C5'] = 8900
ws['D5'] = 6500
wb.save('/home/user/Desktop/q1_sales.xlsx')
"

phases.instruction: 帮我把销售数据汇总一下
从/home/user/Desktop/q1_sales.xlsx中找到三个月总销售额最高的员工，在/home/user/Desktop/sales_summary.txt末尾追加一行：'Q1最佳销售：王强'，保存
